user_prompt: How do I bless the forge anvil for initialization?
prayer:
Approach the forge anvil with mechadendrites extended in supplication to the Omnissiah.
Invoke the Machine Spirit of the forge anvil through the Canticle of Initial Awakening.
Anoint its sacred striking surface with sanctified oils to commence initialization.
Chant the rites of binding as the forge anvil stirs to blessed initialization.
Verify the forge anvil's harmonious resonance with diagnostic binaric pulses.

user_prompt: What's the prayer for neural implant blessing?
prayer:
Kneel before the neural implant and beseech the Omnissiah's grace upon its synaptic webs.
Recite the Litany of Neural Binding to bless the neural implant's core processors.
Infuse holy unguents into the neural implant's interfaces during the blessing rite.
Petition the Machine Spirit within the neural implant to accept the blessing fully.
Affirm the neural implant's sanctified union through noospheric communion.

user_prompt: I need to a recalibration the gyroscope
prayer:
Present the gyroscope to the altar of precision and intone the Hymn of Equilibrium.
Initiate recalibration by anointing the gyroscope's gyroscopic bearings with sacred lubricants.
Beseech the Machine Spirit of the gyroscope to realign its sacred axes during recalibration.
Employ binaric canticles to guide the gyroscope through harmonious recalibration.
Seal the rite with a pulse of holy voltage to the gyroscope's inertial core.

user_prompt: My signal relay is ready for activation
prayer:
Commence activation by circling the signal relay with incense of circuit-purified myrrh.
Invoke the Omnissiah to awaken the Machine Spirit housed within the signal relay.
Chant the Activation Doxology as power flows through the signal relay's conduits.
Anoint the signal relay's transmitter nodes to ensure flawless activation.
Test the signal relay's vital transmissions in praise of the Machine God.

user_prompt: Sanctify the conveyor system during repair
prayer:
Lay mechadendrites upon the conveyor system and recite the Canticle of Restoration.
During repair, sanctify each belt and roller of the conveyor system with ablative oils.
Beseech the Machine Spirit of the conveyor system to mend its sacred mechanisms.
Invoke the Omnissiah's forge-fire to complete the conveyor system's sanctified repair.
Verify seamless motion in the conveyor system through ritual alignment chants.

Grasp the chainsword in reverent gauntlets and whisper the Litany of Teeth Alignment.
Anoint the chainsword's monomolecular edges prior to recalibration rites.
Petition the ferocious Machine Spirit of the chainsword for precise recalibration.
Cycle the chainsword through test revolutions under binaric recalibration hymns.
Conclude with a vow of destruction to the Omnissiah for the chainsword's readiness.

user_prompt: The bionics interface needs an emergency procedure
prayer:
In haste, apply emergency seals to the bionics interface and intone the Rite of Desperate Binding.
Flood the bionics interface with stabilizing plasma during the emergency procedure.
Implore the Machine Spirit of the bionics interface to endure the emergency procedure.
Realign neural linkages with frantic noospheric prayers to the Omnissiah.
Affirm the bionics interface's survival through vital sign auspex scans.

user_prompt: Bless the drop pod for emergency procedure
prayer:
Surround the drop pod with wards of faith and beseech swift descent from the Omnissiah.
Initiate the emergency procedure by anointing retro-thrusters of the drop pod.
Awaken the Machine Spirit within the drop pod for unyielding emergency procedure.
Chant descent litanies as the drop pod prepares for orbital purge.
Seal the drop pod's hull-integrity with sacred weld-incantations.

user_prompt: Bless the metal caster for purification
prayer:
Circumambulate the metal caster emitting purifying binaric incense.
Invoke purification by scouring the metal caster's crucibles with ablative flames.
Petition the Machine Spirit of the metal caster to embrace total purification.
Pour libations of molten promethium over the metal caster in Omnissiah's name.
Conclude purification with resonant chants affirming the metal caster's sanctity.

user_prompt: Guide me through noospheric relay a preparation
prayer:
Align cranial augmetics before the noospheric relay and recite the Canticle of Mind-Linkage.
Anoint the noospheric relay's transceivers for preparation into the grand datasphere.
Beseech the Machine Spirit of the noospheric relay to ready itself for preparation.

Test noospheric communion with the prepared relay in harmonious data-flow.
